title: notodanthonia tenuis
intro: Notodanthonia tenuis, also known as slender danthonia, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Australia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating fever, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Notodanthonia tenuis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
